follow_ups_related_record_required.name: follow_ups_related_record_required
follow_ups_related_record_required.value: "follow_ups"."inquiry_id" is not null or "follow_ups"."quote_id" is not null

inquiries_open_deadline_idx.name: inquiries_open_deadline_idx
inquiries_open_deadline_idx.where: "inquiries"."status" in ('new', 'waiting', 'quoted') and "inquiries"."requested_deadline" is not null and "inquiries"."archived_at" is null and "inquiries"."deleted_at" is null

quotes_sent_follow_up_idx.name: quotes_sent_follow_up_idx
quotes_sent_follow_up_idx.where: "quotes"."status" = 'sent' and "quotes"."customer_responded_at" is null and "quotes"."deleted_at" is null

quotes_auto_follow_up_pending_idx.name: quotes_auto_follow_up_pending_idx
quotes_auto_follow_up_pending_idx.where: "quotes"."auto_follow_up_enabled" = true and "quotes"."auto_follow_up_stopped_at" is null and "quotes"."status" = 'sent' and "quotes"."public_viewed_at" is null and "quotes"."customer_responded_at" is null and "quotes"."deleted_at" is null

quotes_accepted_post_win_idx.name: quotes_accepted_post_win_idx
quotes_accepted_post_win_idx.where: "quotes"."status" = 'accepted' and "quotes"."deleted_at" is null and "quotes"."archived_at" is null
